en: I just wanted to say, I slept on it, I haven't called Townsend yet, but I still feel like
it's the right thing to do.
Well, I didn't sleep so well myself.
Over this? You remember the day I drove you to the warehouse?
ko: 이 일 때문에? 내가 너를 창고로 데려갔던 날 기억나?

en: You were giving me the wrong directions and all that. Yeah, I remember.
ko: 네가 잘못된 방향을 알려줬던 거? 응, 기억해.

en: Okay, well, I stood in the back and I watched you show the workers how to fold and box the clothes.
ko: 응. 그럼, 나는 뒤에 서서 너가 직원들에게 옷을 접고

en: I knew then that was why ATF was a success.
ko: 상자에 담는 방법을 보여주는 걸 지켜봤어.

en: No one else is ever going to have that kind of commitment to your company, Jules.
ko: 그때 나는 ATF가 성공한 이유를 알았어.

en: To me, it's pretty simple. About the fit needs you, and if you don't mind me saying, you need it.
Someone may come in with more experience than you, but they're never going to know what you know.
ko: 누군가 더 많은 걸 가지고 들어올지도 몰라.

en: I never had anything like this in my life. Not many people do.
ko: 그들은 절대 네가 아는 것을 알지 못할 거야.

en: This big, beautiful, exciting thing that you created.
ko: 나는 내 인생에서 이런 경험은 처음이야.
